summary: The documented production build command is not reliable when another local Vite process is active.

evidence.observation: Production builds repeatedly failed because optimized Vite dependency chunks disappeared; the CI build succeeded only after the generated Vite cache was cleared.

evidence.task: Update the agentic AI series index
evidence.observation: The documented CI=true build command failed with the same missing optimized dependency chunk while another local process was active.

evidence.task: Clarify the agentic stack runtime relationship
evidence.observation: The production build again failed because an optimized Vite dependency chunk disappeared, including when rerun outside the sandbox.

recommendation.target: Site validation tooling and repository guidance
recommendation.change: Identify the shared Vite dependency-cache conflict and provide a deterministic production-validation command that does not race with an active local process, then replace the current unsupported claim in AGENTS.md.
recommendation.verification: Run the production build repeatedly while the normal local development process is active without clearing shared caches manually or encountering missing optimized dependency chunks.
